01 // Who I Am

About Me

🌍 Open Source Member 🛡️ Freelance Cyber Consultant 🤝 Team Collaborator 🚀 Embedded Systems Enthusiast

I am Grace Ndudi Makumpa, born on April 19, 2003 in Kinshasa, DRC. A passionate IT Engineer and Junior Cybersecurity Analyst with a solid foundation in network administration, systems security, and software development.

Graduate of ISTA-NDOLO (2025) — one of Africa's leading engineering institutes — with a Bachelor's in Electrical Engineering, specialization in Applied Computer Science. I am certified by Cisco, Google, and Fortinet, with hands-on experience through intensive labs, platforms like TryHackMe and HackTheBox.

I provide freelance cybersecurity and network services to businesses and government organizations. I collaborate with engineers on joint projects, bringing a strong team spirit. My ambition is to join the Conseil National de Cyberdéfense or the ANR as a Cybersecurity Specialist and Forensics expert.

06 // What I Do

Expertise Areas

🌐
Network Administration
LAN/MAN/WAN design with Cisco & Huawei. Router and switch configuration, VLAN, routing protocols, FortiGate firewall. From design to full deployment.
🛡️
Cybersecurity Analysis
SOC operations, log analysis, IOC detection, threat hunting, incident response. Trained on TryHackMe and HackTheBox with Cisco & Fortinet certifications.
🔥
Firewall & IAM
FortiGate firewall configuration & policies. Active Directory, Microsoft Entra ID, Zero Trust, MFA, SSO. Identity and access management in hybrid environments.
💻
Software Development
C, C++, Python, Java, JavaScript development. From system-level programming to web applications and data analysis tools.
🤖
AI & Embedded Systems
IoT development with Arduino, generative AI on constrained hardware, computer vision with OpenCV. At the intersection of electronics and intelligence.
☁️
Cloud & Containerization
Docker containers, Kubernetes orchestration, Microsoft Azure / Entra ID. Modern infrastructure management and cloud security principles.
🔍
Network Monitoring
Traffic analysis with Wireshark, infrastructure monitoring with Zabbix, Nmap scanning, log analysis. Complete network visibility and anomaly detection.
🤝
Team Collaboration
Strong team player who collaborates with engineers on complex projects. Git-based workflows, Jira ticket management, agile methodologies.
